rationale: The citing paper is a meta-analysis of brand/SKU price elasticities (including determinants like promotional vs regular price definitions) across 81 empirical studies, while the cited paper reports scanner-panel promotion elasticity decompositions and interpretation formulas in CPG settings. Even though the matched evidence is only a DOI link (no in-text snippet), this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
